name: OASIS
description: OpenClaw Antidote for Suspicious Injection Signals — deterministic tool security guard with Slack/Discord/Telegram native approval buttons

threshold.description: Risk score threshold. Scores above this value require user approval. Scores at 1.0 are always blocked regardless.

readTools.description: Override default read-only tool list (replaces built-in list). Use customReadTools to add without replacing.

executeTools.description: Override default execute tool list (replaces built-in list). Use customExecuteTools to add without replacing.

customReadTools.description: Additional tool names classified as read-only (appended to defaults)

customExecuteTools.description: Additional tool names classified as execute (appended to defaults)

safeDomains.description: Additional safe domains for URL access (no risk score penalty)

threshold.label: Risk Threshold
threshold.help: Tool calls with risk score above this are sent for approval. 0.0=most strict, 0.9=most lenient. Score 1.0 always blocked.

approvalTimeoutMs.label: Approval Timeout (ms)
approvalTimeoutMs.help: How long to wait for user approval before auto-denying
